overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing Indiana Jones walking through a Mediterranean coastal town at sunset. The character traverses stone pathways along the waterfront, passing through a harbor area with docked boats and NPCs, showcasing detailed historic architecture and warm golden hour lighting.

events.description: passing a parked military truck on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs and along the fortress wall, carrying a rifle on back

notable_agents.action: walking past the truck in the opposite direction

entered.detail: multi-story historic stone building with balconies perched atop the cliff wall
olive green vintage military truck parked along the stone wall
weathered stone steps leading upward along the path

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending stone stairs alongside a massive stone fortress wall. A vintage military truck is parked on the right, and one NPC walks past it in the opposite direction. The path is narrow and enclosed by the stone architecture above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal promenade with sea view

events.description: emerging from enclosed stone path to open waterfront with visible sunset
large sailing ship becomes visible in the harbor ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the open coastal path toward the setting sun

entered.detail: wooden post and chain fence along the waterfront edge
large two-masted sailing vessel docked in the harbor
bright sun low on the horizon casting long golden shadows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide coastal promenade with the setting sun visible ahead over the water. The stone fortress wall falls behind as the character walks along the cobblestone path. A large sailing ship is visible in the distance, and the area is devoid of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy harbor dock with boats on display stands

events.description: entering populated harbor area with dock workers and boats on stands
navigating through crowd of NPCs standing in groups

agents.ego_description: walking through the harbor plaza passing groups of dock workers and fishermen

notable_agents.action: sweeping the dock with a broom
group of workers conversing near the boats on stands

entered.detail: wooden fishing boats propped on wooden stands for maintenance
rusty iron cranes used for hauling boats out of water
stacked cargo boxes along the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bustling harbor plaza where wooden boats rest on stands for repair. Groups of dock workers and fishermen populate the area, with one sweeping the dock nearby. Iron cranes and cargo crates dot the landscape as the character moves through the crowd toward the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pier walkway with roof structure

events.description: entering the covered section of the pier with wooden roof overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered dock area with water visible to the left

notable_agents.action: walking ahead under the covered structure

entered.detail: wooden roofed structure with support columns extending along the dock
vertical posts along the water edge with metal chains

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a covered pier structure that provides partial shade over the dock. Wooden pilings line the water's edge to the left, while the roofed structure extends along the right. The area is quieter with fewer NPCs, and the character continues walking toward the end of the dock.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, enclosed fortress passage into a wide, bustling harbor at sunset. It begins with the character ascending stone stairs beside a massive fortress wall and a parked vintage military truck, where the architecture creates a sense of confinement. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens into a wide coastal promenade with a cobblestone path leading toward the setting sun and a distant sailing ship. The path then shifts into a crowded harbor plaza filled with dock workers, iron cranes, and wooden boats on repair stands before turning toward the water's edge. Finally, the environment transitions into a quieter, shaded area as the character walks beneath a covered pier structure lined with wooden pilings.
